response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content, which is a clip of a 3D concert performance by Raden Juufuutei. 2. Identified the initial screen as an introduction for the "#らでん新衣装お披露目3Dライブ" event. 3. Detected instrumental music playing from 00:16 onwards. 4. Verified the song title '瞬間ハートビート' (Shunkan Heartbeat) through web search based on context and similar performances, which is a known song by ReGLOSS. 5. Confirmed that the song '瞬間ハートビート' is a vocal song and formatted the lyrics in Japanese and English. 6. Structured the data into the requested scene format, noting the vocal content and performer.
response.global_summary: The video features the introductory screen and the performance of the song '瞬間ハートビート' (Shunkan Heartbeat) during Raden Juufuutei's 3D live event.

scenes.description: The video begins with an introductory graphic for Raden Juufuutei's 3D Live New Outfit Reveal. No music is playing.
The song '瞬間ハートビート' begins, starting with a shout and transitioning into an instrumental performance accompanied by 3D visuals.

理屈を超える変化を求めていた
窮屈で退屈な日々の中

描く未来予想図は

すべて叶える 絵空事

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Vague anxiety, I was craving fun
Did I feel out of place in daily life? I was sick of it
The usual scenery I was used to
I was looking for a change that would go beyond logic
In the midst of stifling and boring days
Suddenly, you appeared
As if running through every cell in my whole body
An unfinished story that started to run
The scenery that was monochrome, now
Meeting you, it gets colored colorfully, Brand New World
My heart was stolen
A capricious, momentary heartbeat
In the gaps of wavering space-time
I am not alone anymore, a shimmering star
The future forecast I'm drawing
I want to draw the same dream together
Beyond the endless journey
A romance that won't stop ringing is waiting
When I realized it
I can't live without you
If I'm with you forever
The universe that expands from here on
Flying out into the clear sky
My mood is top-notch, beyond imagination
Let's end the empty theories on paper
Making everything come true, a fantasy
The clock's hands spin and turn
Vividly in limited time, Dancing Time
My heart was stolen
A capricious, momentary heartbeat
In the gaps of wavering space-time
I am not alone anymore, a shimmering star
The future forecast I'm drawing
I want to draw the same dream together
Beyond the endless journey
There must be a clear miracle
Goodbye, melancholic
I can't stop this impulse
I'm just going to push forward
Without minding my appearance, are you ready?
There is no limit, a dimension of infinite purity
Scattered flashes, overflowing in the night sky
Let's share joy twice as much as sadness
If I'm with you, anywhere.
